root.text: Hi, I'm trying to keep a Fuse app compatible with Android 15 (targetSDK 35). I'm using fuselibs and Uno (v3.0.0-beta11). Any suggestions? On a real device, it only works when I set targetSDK 34, but it stops working when I upgrade to the next target level. My guess is that there's some sort of graphics rendering issue. Any advice would be appreciated.

elements.text: Hi, I'm trying to keep a Fuse app compatible with Android 15 (targetSDK 35). I'm using fuselibs and Uno (v3.0.0-beta11). Any suggestions? On a real device, it only works when I set targetSDK 34, but it stops working when I upgrade to the next target level. My guess is that there's some sort of graphics rendering issue. Any advice would be appreciated.

text: The problem was the edge-to-edge functionality on Android 15. Manage the internal padding of the main view and fix it.

elements.text: The problem was the edge-to-edge functionality on Android 15. Manage the internal padding of the main view and fix it.
